detail.description: Drew Romo singles on a line drive to left fielder Alex Call. Tristan Peters to 2nd.
Drew Romo doubles (3) on a line drive to right fielder Wenceel Pérez.
Drew Romo homers (5) on a fly ball to right field. Tristan Peters scores.

Drew Romo doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Seiya Suzuki. Andrew Benintendi scores.
Drew Romo homers (4) on a fly ball to right field.
Drew Romo doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Connor Joe.
Drew Romo homers (2) on a fly ball to center field.
Drew Romo homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Sam Antonacci scores.
Drew Romo doubles (5) on a line drive to left fielder Wyatt Langford.
Drew Romo singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Drew Gilbert. Jarred Kelenic scores. Tristan Peters to 3rd.

Drew Romo singles on a ground ball to left fielder Cooper Ingle. Tristan Peters to 2nd.
